benefits.description: Glucose management improved with inositol (40:1), 2-3 meals per day with no snacking, and fiber-first eating approach; more effective than metformin alone

protocol_notes: Not overweight; microdosing reta. Also taking berberine and inositol (40:1). Used a CGM for a couple of months. Advocates for minimum effective dose philosophy. Notes that semaglutide slows stomach emptying reducing glucose spikes.
